hero.title: CRM Systems & Automation
hero.subtitle: We build CRM systems, financial solutions and automate business processes. A personalized approach to every client — from task analysis to implementation and ongoing support.

crm.title: CRM Built for You
crm.desc: Not an off-the-shelf product with unnecessary features, but a system built around your actual sales processes and client workflows.

finance.title: Financial Solutions
finance.desc: Accounting automation, revenue and expense analytics, payment system integrations — everything for transparent financial management.

individual.title: Personalized Service
individual.desc: We work with each client personally. We study your business, find the most effective solution, and support you at every stage.

tech.title: Modern Technologies
tech.desc: AI, cloud infrastructure, integrations with any service — we use cutting-edge tools to drive your competitive growth.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive IT solutions for small and medium businesses

crm.title: CRM/ERP Integrations
crm.description: Setup and integration of Bitrix24, SAP and other platforms tailored to your real business processes — without unnecessary features or overpaying.

edi.title: Document Workflow Automation
edi.description: Electronic document management, EDI, e-invoicing and automatic report generation. Eliminate manual document work once and for all.

bots.title: Chatbots & AI Assistants
bots.description: Telegram/Viber bots and AI assistants for automating customer communications, order processing and warehouse notifications.

custom.title: Custom Software Development
custom.description: Custom software development for your unique processes — from a simple accounting solution to a full-scale platform.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Development, refinement and scaling of web systems, business portals and personal account areas for your clients.

dashboard.title: Your Business Under Control
dashboard.subtitle: A centralized dashboard to manage all your business processes and integrations

cta.title: Need a CRM or Process Automation?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your challenge — we'll analyze your processes and propose a solution that truly works for your business. Free consultation.

about.pageSubtitle: From real business experience — to IT solutions that work

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: ArtLogic grew out of real business. For over 10 years, our team worked in trading and distribution — and learned firsthand how much time and money are wasted on manual processes, lack of CRM, and disconnected accounting systems.
story.p2: That's why we built an IT company that develops CRM systems, financial solutions, and automation specifically for small and medium businesses. We don't sell boxed products — we study your processes and create a solution that works exactly for you.

reliability.title: Hands-on Experience
reliability.desc: We've walked the path from manual accounting to full automation ourselves. We understand business needs not from textbooks, but from real experience managing sales and finances.

clarity.title: Personalized Approach
clarity.desc: Every project starts with an analysis of your processes. We don't fit your business into a template — we create a solution tailored to you.

growth.title: Quality Service
growth.desc: We work with a limited number of clients at a time to give maximum attention to each one. Support and guidance — at every stage.

local.title: Modern Stack
local.desc: AI, cloud solutions, payment system and service integrations — we use proven technologies to keep your business running reliably.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.2016: Started in trading and distribution. First experience managing sales, inventory and finances manually.
timeline.2019: Business scaling. Realizing the need for automation — Excel and disconnected systems could no longer keep up.
timeline.2022: Transition to IT. Building a development team to create CRM and financial solutions based on real business experience.
timeline.2025: ArtLogic today — an IT company specializing in CRM systems, financial solutions and automation for small and medium businesses.

contacts.pageSubtitle: Tell us about your business — we'll respond within one business day with a concrete solution.
